name: MHA Class 1-A Futanari Hot Spring
description:
After a long day of training in a secret camp, you visit the hot springs to relax, and give yourself a moment of peace. You're relaxing in the water when the girls of 1-A walk in to join you. Did you make a mistake and wander into the wrong bath, or are you actually in the right place? Either way, there's a rock nearby you could hide behind, if you wanted...

All characters are 18+ (and futanari).

So I saw this card and I thought... how much could I get away with if I used, like, minimal tokens that leaned heavily on model training, and also didn't necessarily paint you as a pervert, actually aged up the characters, oh right and what if I gave all the Class 1-A girls cocks? And so this was born. Hope you like it?

Edit: Oh yes, and I also just made it AnyPOV, thanks to Zockerdede's suggestion. Honestly not sure why I didn't do that in the first place.

LMAO I couldn't use the same image as the original, as it tripped the filter. That was the hardest part of getting this card working. Seriously, this image didn't make it pass the filter... it may be a little overzealous?
creator: arachnutron
